name: justicechain
description: JusticeChain - Platform for justice system transparency and accountability

scripts.install:all: npm install && npm --prefix africajustice-backend install && npm --prefix africajustice-frontend install
scripts.dev:both: npm run dev:backend & npm run dev:frontend
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix africajustice-frontend && npm run build --prefix africajustice-backend
scripts.lint: npm run lint --prefix africajustice-frontend && npm run lint --prefix africajustice-backend
scripts.type-check: npm run type-check --prefix africajustice-frontend && npm run type-check --prefix africajustice-backend
scripts.test: npm run test --prefix africajustice-frontend && npm run test --prefix africajustice-backend
scripts.test:coverage: npm run test:coverage --prefix africajustice-frontend && npm run test --prefix africajustice-backend -- --coverage

author: JusticeChain Team
